base_prompt: 2D top-down tilemap texture for a parking lot management game, flat ground surface texture viewed from directly above, seamless tile that connects with adjacent tiles, completely flat with no elevation or depth, vector-style flat colors, simple clean design like SimCity or Prison Architect, fills the entire square with no margins or borders, 64x64 pixels
negative_prompt: 3D, elevated, raised, floating, platform, depth, thickness, shadow around edges, border, outline, frame, margin, padding, standalone object, icon, realistic, photograph, isometric, perspective, side view, gradient, detailed texture, text, letters, numbers, pixelated, blurry, sketch, cartoon, anime, rounded corners on tile edges
style_notes: True top-down view (90 degrees) - no perspective or tilt
Flat vector style with maximum 2 shades per surface
Soft shadow using black at 10-15% opacity, directly below objects
No outlines, gradients, or complex textures
Rounded corners (4-8px radius equivalent at 64px scale)
Colors should match the Kilowatt Tycoon palette
Management sim aesthetic - calm and professional
